title: ophiorrhiza quanzhouensis
intro: Ophiorrhiza quanzhouensis, a type of flowering plant belonging to the family Rubiaceae, is native to China and is also known as Quanzhou milk-vetch. The plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Ophiorrhiza quanzhouensis include the ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote digestion. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in the form of capsules or tablets.
